violations.text: A towel observed in the hand-washing sink in the potato area. Ice observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Sausage observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. PIC stated it had been frozen after prepared, and just removed from freezer. A system of date marking with date of preparation and the thawing date must be implemented. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen, and the food preparation area of the basement. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the grill, numerous food containers in the basement, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Several food containers have an accumulation of old paper stickers and adhesive. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement food prep area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

A bottle brush and scouring pad were observed in the hand-washing sink in the basement potato area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food containers in prep unit, food container holding salt pork in walk in cooler, and food processor bowls) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Cut turkey and ham observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Utensils in the cooking area displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Water observed in stacked plastic drinking cups, and in numerous stacked plastic food containers. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on the back kitchen storage shelf. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
Food processor bowl, and some plastic food containers observed not in good repair, cracked with pieces missing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: grill stove areas beneath grill and stove prep table food storage containers in basement food storage containers in walk in cooler can opener base Fan on kitchen stairway to basement Numerous food containers have an accumulation of old paper stickers & adhesive Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in areas of the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The corner wall in the warewashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The floors especially in the basement have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area (on the prep table in the back kitchen area). Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Hand sinks area lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand washing sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Raw animal foods (egg whites, shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk, potatoes) in the walk-in cooler and reach in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, knives, food containers in the potato area, mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Potatoes and beef observed held at 51-68 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Potatoes were placed on the grill to reheat, and beef was placed in refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Sausage & peppers, ham, pancakes, potatoes observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the basement, walk in cooler, walk in freezer, and cooking area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Wiping clothes were being stored in mop sink, and on shelves in the front cooking area. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Strawberries were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut.Washed fruits and vegetables must be placed in clean sanitized containers, not the original container. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Knife observed stored with the handle in the lettuce. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Utensils in the cooking area are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Water observed in stacked plastic cups.After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Single use items are being reused for food preparation and storage.Single use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Employee observed cooking, then entering data on computer screen, and returning to cooking without changing gloves.Gloves must be used for one task only. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Food equipment such as pots and plastic fish buckets observed not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:prep unitsbread filing cabinet4 burner unit,grillbread machinemixerpotato peelerdunnage racksshelvesplastic soda crates used as dunnage racksrefrigerators, including door tracksfryersarea beneath grilletc. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The coving in the warewashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The ceiling in the basement storage area is in poor repair, with areas of missing ceiling material. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Water pipes in the basement ceiling are poor repair, with water observed dripping on the floor at the bottom of the dining room stairs. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on top of items in front of storage shelves, and on top of prep unit. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
